subcodes.first_line: The Day hath indeed come, and the people have denied God, the Almighty, the All-Compelling. The signs have appeared and the verses have been sent down, yet the people [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد اتی الیوم و کفر القوم بالله المقتدر الجبار اتت العلامات و نزلت الایات و الناس
subcodes.subjects: @chastisement and requital, @historical episodes and the lessons of the past, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times
